Soil/Rock Description: Moderately strong to strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite stained and clean joints, dipping 10-20, 60-70, 80-85.
